"E:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\server.dir/objects.a
"E:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\server.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\server.dir\objects1.rsp
"E:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\c++.exe" -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\server.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o server.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libserver.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\server.dir\linkLibs.rsp
